steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states “we simply cannot say for certain” about how the original people understood the paintings.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank requires a word meaning not known or undetermined. “Unknown” precisely captures this—the original meaning of the paintings cannot be ascertained.

The other options describe unrelated properties: unchangingness, predictability, and absence of dispute.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
